raw_input:
[5.0/5] Excellent Natural Deodorant I checked the ingredients list of this non-aluminum containing deodorant and everything that's in it is what I put in my own home made deodorants. Shea buttter, coconut oil, arrowroot powder, cornstarch, essential oils, etc... It has a lovely scent, and you don't need much. It won't stop sweating, but it will keep the smelly bacteria from breeding for a while so you don't stink. I could feel the slight graininess of the cornstarch and arrowroot powder which let me know it was good quality. I really like this and feel it is every bit as good as my own homemade deodorant. [5.0/5] smells nice First and foremost- this is a cream deodorant. If you have never used a cream it is basically rubbing lotion into your arms pits (anyone remember Tussy deodorant?) We gave this a go and it smells really nice- a little strong (Jasmine has a very strong sweet scent), but pleasant. Did not irritate the skin at all and pretty much stopped odor (we did have a very sweaty 1.5 hour workout and by the end of that we were pretty stinky). For normal daily use this works just fine and keeps you stink free. It does leave a bit of a challenge residue on clothes so watch out for sleeveless clothing. [4.0/5] A little goes a long way! This Pretty Frank natural deodorant has a pretty strong Jasmine scent. The instructions say to use a piece size amount. I didn’t read that at first and applied too much making the smell over powering. If you use the appropriate amount, the smell is not too strong. It helps keep you fresh smelling all day! Keep in mind this does not have anti-perspirant in it so it will allow you to sweat. However, it should help prevent odor. I like the fact that this is aluminum free, paraben free, toxin free and petroleum free. it is also free of imitation perfumes.

So far, I like using this product but need to put it to a test on a hot humid day while exercising! If that does the trick, I will update my review to five stars. The weather in my area is very stormy, so I am unable to give this a full testing! However, this has worked for me so far wearing this under normal daily activities. [5.0/5] Surprisingly Good Natural Deodorant I was surprised at how effective Pretty Frank Natural Deodorant in a Jar was. It has been my experience that when the word natural goes on to a product you find it is not as good as the standard, but this one is.
I apply the cream like deodorant once a day after my shower.
I have no issues with odors for a full 24 hours and it could last longer, I guess but I haven't tried it. It has a fresh light scent and I have experienced no irritation from using it though I have sensitive skin.
This deodorant works for me as well as the standard stick but without the skin irritation. [3.0/5] Not for me I like the fact that its organic and made in the US. However, this is not a deodorant for someone who is on the move. I do have sweaty underarms and I had to clean my armpits and apply this several times a day to be dry. I don't like that I have to put this on with my fingers. I was dry long as I wasn't moving around to much and in a cool place. The jasmine scent is wonderful. It is a small jar but you get a lot. [5.0/5] excellent deodorant Pretty Frank Natural Deodorant, formerly known as Primal Pit Paste is amazing. It contains arrowroot powder and baking soda, which work wonders together at keeping me completely odor free.

This jasmine scent is pretty nice too. It's flowery but not too overpowering.

I'm writing this on a Sunday after applying the deodorant Friday night. I haven't showered in 2 days due to a plumbing issue. Two days later and I still do not stink at all. This stuff is amazing. I don't think I'll ever be going back to synthetic deodorant again. [5.0/5] Love the glass jar and the jasmine scent is heavenly Getting your deodorant from a jar on your counter may be a little less convenient that using a stick, but I am embracing the slowing down of my routine and looking for the positives. First off: the scent, it is absolutely heavenly. I'm not usually one to go crazy over a flowery smell (I'm more of a fresh lawn clippings person) but this scent reminds me of lilac, so I automatically love it. I spend all year not so patiently waiting to get a whiff of that bush in bloom, so anything that gives me an occasional reminder during my lilac-less days is a winner in my book. Second positive note: the jar. I am really digging this jar. I like that this glass jar looks way better sitting on my counter than an awkward shaped stick made of plastic. I don't feel like I have to hid it if company come over. I am also super glad that it isn't something that I have to stick the whole thing on my stinking pit and mark it with my scent like I'm some sort of animal. Because I only use my finger to remove a pea size amount it is more hygienic for sharing with a family member or a particularly stinky guest that has conveniently forgotten their own deodorant. The paste warms up really quickly when rolling it between your fingers and it makes it easy to spread it around your pit. If the instructions say to wait a little while before putting your clothes on, just do it. Take the time to implement this self care during these weird times we are living in. Massage your deodorant on to your skin, stand topless for a little while longer, take care in washing your hands again because you've got deo all over them now. I don't know why people are complaining about having to wash their hands after applying it, you should be washing your hands as much as possible these days and all days forever. People are gross, but at least if they are using this they will smell better. I like that it is made in the US and the jar lid is the only bit of plastic on it. I am curious to try out other scents from this company as well, that woodlands seems to be calling my name. I might get some of that next after I empty this jar, it might take a while since a little goes a long way. I like this stuff, so go get you some too. [5.0/5] Very soft and lovely Looks very grainy because it’s baking soda but it goes on so incredibly smoothly and disappears into the skin leaving your underarms very soft. Very light lovely scent and not at all cloying. Definelty want to order another one once I finish this one. I especially like the glass container it comes in, adds a nice quality touch. And I can understand all the ingredients in it, the majority which are organic. [5.0/5] Love the jar and smells like jasmine Like the size of this jar it comes with a lot of product. Smells like jasmine and it’s all natural ingredients. The paste goes on smooth and it’s very creamy and thick. Helped me stay fresh all day and hid my B.O. very happy with this product!! A little goes a long way. Half a pea size for each armpit was more than enough for me because the product melts into the skin. [5.0/5] Pretty Frank Natural Deodorant Jar- No Aluminum Deodorant I really love this deodorant. It doesn’t contain aluminum. As it states, a little goes a long way. I work in Nursing so my workload is very heavy and I sweat a lot. I’m still smelling fresh when using this. It’s easy to apply. Just grab a pinch, rub it between two fingers and apply. You don’t need to use a lot. It has a nice consistency. Not sticky. Not too think or too thick. Doesn’t stain hands or clothing. I wish the scent was a bit stronger but I still love it overall. [5.0/5] Smells nice Works great [5.0/5] Impressed I was thoroughly surprised by this deodorant. I have used other natural deodorants in the past with no success. I was not sure how well application would work but it just sort of warms between your fingers and goes on easily. I thought it worked as well if not better than the name brand deodorant I have been using for years. I also love the scent! It is clean and just a bit flirty. I would definitely recommend! [5.0/5] Works great! This deodorant works really well. I've been trying different options for aluminum free. I like this because it works, the scent is nice and light, and I feel like I won't waste any because it is a jar that you scoop some out and spread on. [5.0/5] Great natural deodorant with baking soda and essential oils This deodorant comes in a glass jar and is made with simple, natural ingredients that are good for your skin and provide pleasant aromas. Baking soda, coconut oil, shea butter, and vitamin E are included along with some natural essential oils that add a pleasant aroma. This company offers different scent options - this one is rather flowery, with scents like ylang ylang and gardenia. This is certainly somewhat expensive for a deodorant but it is worth paying extra to get something natural with organic ingredients that won't irritate your skin or harm your health. Unlike some products that just spray on scents this item uses baking soda to help absorb odors too. This is something I would definitely suggest if you want a natural deodorant and don't mind applying something that is in a jar rather than a roll-on or spray container. [1.0/5] Almost no scent Has no scent really.. but wanted to switch to natural . Dont mind apply with finger . It doez contain baking soda if you have sensitive skin not sure if you should try.

response:
Pretty Frank Natural Deodorant get many good reviews. Most people say work well, smell nice like jasmine, keep stink away all day. Many impressed natural deodorant work as good as regular kind.

Ingredients simple and natural - shea butter, coconut oil, arrowroot powder, baking soda, essential oils. No aluminum, no paraben, no toxin. People like can understand what in it.

Come in glass jar. People like jar look nice on counter. Apply with finger, pea size amount enough. Warm up between fingers, go on smooth. Little go long way.

Not stop sweat, only stop stink. Work good for normal daily use but some say fail during heavy workout. One person with very sweaty pits say have to reapply many times.

Few complaints - one person say almost no scent. One say leave residue on clothes. Applying with finger bother some people. Baking soda maybe bad for sensitive skin.

Most people very happy, say buy again, never go back to regular deodorant.
